PluginData.Author: Viktor Ferenczi
PluginData.Tooltip: Build and repair multigrid projections (PDCs, mechs and more), in survival and creative, single player and multiplayer.
PluginData.Description:
Multigrid Projector lets you build and repair multigrid blueprints (ships with rotors, hinges and pistons - PDCs, mechs and more) directly from a projector.
Works in survival and creative, single player and multiplayer. In multiplayer most of the multigrid welding works with just this client plugin; install the server plugin as well (via Magnetar/Quasar) for full functionality.
For help, troubleshooting and bug reports join the SE Mods Discord: https://discord.gg/PYPFPGf3Ca
